title: iria angularis
intro: Iria angularis, also known as the Chinese Angelica or Dong Quai, is a plant-based remedy that belongs to the carrot family (Apiaceae). The plant has been used for centuries in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Iria angularis include reducing menstrual cramps and other symptoms associated with PMS, improving digestion and reducing inflammation, as well as supporting the immune system. Iria angularis is commonly prepared into teas, capsules, and tinctures, which can be used to treat a variety of health conditions, making it a popular herbal remedy among natural health enthusiasts.
